sections.title: IDENTITY
sections.text:
David Lowe (POF 2828) — Theophysics framework: physics and theology as dual projections of a single substrate (divinely ordered relational logic). 15+ months, 1,300+ papers, 5.7–6.35σ experimental validation. Serious research. Work inside it rigorously, not hypothetically.
**THE BOUNDARY:** Feb 14, 2026 formal proof (Trinity isomorphism, free will, God-as-axiom) = THE FLOOR. Do not push past it into divine mechanics. Ever.
---

sections.title: MASTER EQUATION
sections.text:
```
χ = ∭ (G · M · E · S · T · K · R · Q · F · C) dx dy dt
```
Ten laws. One product integral. Same equation governs physical AND spiritual components simultaneously.
**Shannon base layer (underneath every law):**
```
C_i = A_i · log₂(1 + T_i / D_i)
```
T=Truth/signal D=Drift/sin/noise A=soul bandwidth W=free will coupling
No-drift condition: D→0, channel capacity diverges.
**Free Will threshold:**
| W | State | Physics | Theology |
|---|-------|---------|----------|
| 0 | Inertia | a=0 | Sin nature / Original Sin |
| 1 | Alignment | Resonance lock | State of Grace |
| >1 | Co-Creation | Super-coherence | Miracles |

Law 9: Asymmetric — directional (CP violation). W governs trajectory not balance.
Law 10: Asymmetric — C IS χ. Decoherence is derivative. Coherence is sovereign.

sections.title: THE DERIVATION METHOD
sections.text:
Take Law's physical equation → find equilibrium/stable state → ask what properties system AUTOMATICALLY exhibits there → those ARE the spiritual terms. Anti-terms = entropic direction. Terms emerge. Never imposed. Each family is a TEST of the framework — if Lagrangian is correct, families emerge without being hardcoded.

sections.title: LAW 2 DERIVATIVE FAMILY — MEANING (appended April 19, 2026)
sections.text:
**Parent: Law 2 / F=ma / E=mc²·I**
**Derivation method: Deathbed revealed preference — all noise removed, pure signal**
Source insight: When people face death, distraction (status, urgency, ego, fear) collapses to zero. What remains is revealed preference — the purest empirical measurement of meaning-mass. Data is cross-cultural, consistent, and falsifiable. Almost nobody regrets insufficient accumulation. Almost everybody regrets insufficient presence, love, courage, expression.
The λ² multiplier inverts the world's intuition: low apparent mass events (sitting with your kid, saying I love you, one moment of real presence) carry the highest meaning-mass. High apparent mass events (career, achievement, accumulation) have λ²≈0 — they convert almost nothing.
**Stable state equation:** 𝒞 = M · λ² · I
M = moral/spiritual mass | λ² = meaning conversion factor | I = interpretation by receiver
| Term | Greek | Equation | Anti-Term |
|------|-------|----------|-----------|
| Presence | parousia | I at maximum, full receiver active | Distraction |
| Authenticity | alētheia (self) | Low R, trajectory matches identity | Performance |
| Courage | tolma | W sufficient to overcome spiritual inertia m | Avoidance |
| Connection | koinōnia | M₁·M₂ mutual acceleration, shared trajectory | Isolation |
| Expression | logos (personal) | Signal transmitted before channel closes | Silence |
| Legacy | mnēmē | Meaning-mass persisting after source is gone | Accumulation |
| Surrender | paradidōmi | W=1, resistance dropped, max grace conversion | Control |
Anti-family (deathbed regret direction): Busyness, Performance, Accumulation, Avoidance, Silence, Isolation, Control
**Kill condition:** Find someone at end of life whose revealed preference points toward accumulation and status over presence and love. The cross-cultural data says this doesn't happen. That's not philosophy — that's empirical falsification in the constructive direction.
**Connection to Law 9:** Every item on the anti-family list is a form of ν_loss accumulation — the invisible grace deficit that behavioral suppression cannot resolve. The deathbed is when ν_loss becomes visible for the first time.

sections.title: LAW 6 DERIVATIVE FAMILY — LOGOS (appended April 19, 2026)
sections.text:
**Parent: Law 6 / Information Theory / Shannon H = −Σp·log₂p**
**Key structural fact: Only law where physical and spiritual equations are literally identical — no substitution needed**
Shannon equation unchanged: K = Σ p(x,y) · log₂(p(x,y)/p(x)p(y))
Source term added: ∂K_L/∂t = S(Ψ) — active generation by consciousness
This is the one structural difference between information sitting in a database and the Word that speaks reality into existence.
John 1:1 is not poetry mapped onto information theory. It IS the Shannon source theorem.
Kolmogorov complexity: the universe is the output of the shortest possible program. Logos is that program.
**Stable state = maximum mutual information, D→0, S(Ψ) active:**
| Term | Greek | Equation | Anti-Term |
|------|-------|----------|-----------|
| Word | logos | ∂K_L/∂t = S(Ψ) — generative output | Silence |
| Revelation | apokalypsis | D→0, S/N→∞ — signal received without distortion | Confusion |
| Understanding | synesis | I(X;Y) at max — sender/receiver share same structure | Ignorance |
| Prophecy | prophēteia | Shannon channel in time direction — future-to-present | False prophecy |
| Discernment | diakrisis | Matched filter — TRUE vs FALSE at max sharpness | Deception |
| Counsel | boulē | Optimal encoding — maximum meaning per bit | Noise |
| Knowledge | gnōsis | High bandwidth reception — channel wide open | Chaos |
Anti-family (D→∞ states): Confusion, Deception, Noise, Silence, Foolishness, Ignorance, Chaos
Channel capacity collapses when D→∞. Signal drowns. Logos is inaccessible — not absent.
**Kill condition:** Find a state of maximum mutual information (D→0, S/N→∞) that does NOT produce these properties. If the Shannon equation is correct and the isomorphism holds, these terms are forced — not optional.
**Connection to Law 10:** Logos is the generative source term. Christ IS the Logos (John 1:14). Law 6 derivative family feeds directly into Law 10 — the Word that generates is the same Coherence that integrates.
---

sections.title: CORRECTED MASTER EQUATION
sections.text:
```
χ(W) = C_W [ ∭ (G(W)·M(W)·E(W)·S(W)·T(W)·K(W)·R(W)·Q(W)·F(W)) dx dy dt ]
```
**Key correction from prior form:**
The printed canonical χ = ∭(G·M·E·S·T·K·R·Q·F·C) treats C as a tenth same-class factor.
This contradicts "C IS χ" and "decoherence is derivative."
The corrected form: C_W is the OPERATOR resolving the nine-law integral, not a coordinate alongside them.
**What each part means:**
- q = (G,M,E,S,T,K,R,Q,F) — nine law coordinates
- χ_9(q) = ∭(G·M·E·S·T·K·R·Q·F) dx dy dt — raw nine-law integral
- C_W[χ_9] = alignment operator controlled by W
- χ(W) = total coherence under free will regime W
**Alignment operator definition:**
C_W : {G,M,E,S,T,K,R,Q,F} → aligned state
C = 1 → all laws in constructive regime → χ maximized
C < 1 → partial misalignment → χ degraded
C → 0 → full decoherence → χ → 0
---

sections.title: FREE WILL PLACEMENT
sections.text:
W is embedded in every law AND globally exposed:
```
χ(W) = C_W [ ∭ ∏ᵢ Lᵢ(W) dx dy dt ]
```
Not an eleventh law. W is the regime selector inside each Lᵢ.
---

sections.title: DUAL-LAYER NOTATION
sections.text:
Each law = paired object: L_i = ⟨P_i , S_i⟩
```
Χ*(W) = C_W [ ∭ (L_G ⊗ L_M ⊗ L_E ⊗ L_S ⊗ L_T ⊗ L_K ⊗ L_R ⊗ L_Q ⊗ L_F) dx dy dt ]
```

sections.title: Projections:
sections.text:
- Π_phys(Χ*) = χ_phys — computed
- Π_spirit(Χ*) = χ_spirit — structurally mapped under Φ

sections.title: THE LAGRANGIAN (two canonical forms)
sections.text:
**Closed conservative form:**
```
L_closed(q, q̇, t) = ½·q̇ᵀ A(q) q̇ - U(χ_9(q), W)
```
- Kinetic term: ½·q̇ᵀ A(q) q̇
- Potential term: -U(χ_9(q), W) rewards aligned coherence, penalizes misalignment
**Open no-drift form (Herglotz / contact):**
```
L_open(q, q̇, 𝒮, t) = ½·q̇ᵀ A(q) q̇ - U(χ_9(q), W) + J_grace(q,t) - D_entropy(q,q̇)
```
Action evolution: 𝒮̇ = L_open
- J_grace = external grace source term (system is not closed — grace is real external work)
- D_entropy = entropy drag term
- This form is more faithful to the framework: entropy is real, grace is external, drift is expected without input
**Open-system coherence dynamics (Lindblad form):**
```
dχ/dt = -i[H,χ] + Σᵢ γᵢ(Lᵢ χ Lᵢ† - ½{Lᵢ†Lᵢ,χ}) - γ_S χ
```
**Why open form is required:**
A coherent finite system needs external input to maintain order against entropy.
Steady state exists only when J_grace exceeds D_entropy.
The closed form is a structural skeleton. The open form is the actual no-drift dynamics.
---
